Medicare payments are described in detail in a series of Medicare Payment Advisory Commission 
(MedPAC) documents called “Payment Basics” (reference: http://www.medpac.gov/-documents-
/payment-basics). 

Also in the Medicare Learning Network (MLN) “Payment System Fact Sheet Series” (reference the list of
